ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "company_overview" TEXT /* Overview and description of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was first listed on the exchange */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* The dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* The beta value indicating the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* The highest price of the stock over the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock over the past 52 weeks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the stock exchange */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the stock exchange was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, which accounts for splits and dividends */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the trading day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data (e.g., Alpha Vantage, Yahoo Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the index is tracked */,
  "calculation_method" TEXT /* The method used to calculate the index value */,
  "components_count" INTEGER /* The number of stocks or securities in the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_indices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_value" REAL /* Opening value of the index */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the index during the trading day */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the index during the trading day */,
  "close_value" REAL /* Closing value of the index */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the index */,
  "adjusted_value" REAL /* Adjusted value of the index, which accounts for splits and other adjustments */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the index price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_prices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indices" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the stock in the index (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indices_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock (if applicable) */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the index (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Preferred data source (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  "watchlist" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of stocks in the user's watchlist */,
  "alert_threshold" TEXT /* Alert threshold settings for price movements */,
  "theme" TEXT /* The preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) for the user interface */,
  "language" TEXT /* The preferred language for the user interface */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news item */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news item */,
  "importance" TEXT /* Importance of the news (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news item */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the news (e.g., earnings, economic, market updates) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping record */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news item */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* A score indicating the relevance of the news to the stock */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* The sentiment of the news (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news_feeds ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock (if applicable) */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news item (if applicable) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price_movement, news) */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Trigger value for the alert (e.g., 5% increase in price) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* The method for sending notifications (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news_feeds ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., technical_analysis, fundamental_analysis) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of users or groups the report is shared with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* The URL to a thumbnail image of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Alpha Vantage, Yahoo Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last data sync from the source */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of data sync (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
